title: guarea pterorhachis subsp. pterorhachis
intro: Guarea pterorhachis subsp. pterorhachis, also known as Pterocarpus pterocarpoides, is a plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of this plant include wound healing, antimicrobial activity, and the treatment of various infections. The herbal preparations of Guarea pterorhachis subsp. pterorhachis typically involve the use of its bark or leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or ointments for various medicinal purposes.
